queries.name: universities-offering-credentials
queries.query: from:(@Harvard OR @Stanford OR @MIT OR @Cornell OR @DukeU OR @OhioState OR @ASU OR @BU_Tweets OR @UNC) (certificate OR certification OR program)
queries.description: Direct monitoring of top universities posting about certificates

queries.name: elearning-platforms-certifications
queries.query: from:(@coursera OR @udemy OR @edXOnline OR @udacity OR @LinkedInLearn) (certificate OR course OR learn)
queries.description: Major e-learning platforms posting about certificates

queries.name: bootcamp-providers
queries.query: from:(@GA OR @FlatironSchool OR @FullstackAcad OR @lewagonparis OR @ironhack OR @springboard) (graduate OR certificate OR completion OR program)
queries.description: Major bootcamps posting about student achievements

queries.name: professional-certifications
queries.query: (certificate OR certification OR certified) (issued OR earned OR completed) min_faves:5 lang:en -is:retweet

queries.name: digital-credentials-discussion
queries.query: (digital credential OR digital badge OR digital certificate) min_faves:3 lang:en -is:retweet

queries.name: european-universities
queries.query: from:(@OpenUniversity OR @UniofOxford OR @EdinburghUni OR @UCL OR @HECParis) (certificate OR course OR program OR student)

queries.name: online-learning-achievements
queries.query: (completed OR finished OR graduated) (online course OR bootcamp) min_faves:3 lang:en -is:retweet

queries.name: credential-fraud-news
queries.query: (fake degree OR diploma mill OR credential fraud OR verification) min_faves:10 lang:en -is:retweet

queries.name: blockchain-education
queries.query: (blockchain OR web3) (education OR certificate OR credential OR learning) min_faves:5 lang:en -is:retweet

queries.name: micro-credentials
queries.query: (micro-credential OR microcredential OR nanodegree OR digital badge) min_faves:3 lang:en -is:retweet

queries.name: university-partnerships
queries.query: (university partnership OR academic partnership) (certificate OR credential OR program) min_faves:5 lang:en -is:retweet

queries.name: education-technology
queries.query: (edtech OR edutech OR education technology) (certificate OR credential OR verification) min_faves:5 lang:en -is:retweet

queries.name: professional-development
queries.query: (professional development OR upskilling OR reskilling) certificate min_faves:3 lang:en -is:retweet

queries.name: continuing-education-providers
queries.query: ("continuing education" OR "professional development" OR CEU OR CPE) (certificate OR credential OR certificate) (university OR college OR provider) lang:en -is:retweet

queries.name: badge-platforms
queries.query: (Credly OR Badgr OR "Open Badges" OR Accredible) (digital badge OR credential OR certificate OR verification)

settings.description: Discovers institutional accounts (universities, e-learning platforms, bootcamps) that are potential customers for BWS products. Uses keyword searches to find organizations discussing credentials, certificates, and educational programs.
